tasks.name: Analyze our project, what other features would be useful for us
tasks.fullName: Analyze our project, what other features would be useful for us

tasks.name: Editable task description
tasks.fullName: Editable task description in detail panel
tasks.description: Task description is set at creation and can never be changed. Make it editable in the detail panel, similar to how the task name is already editable inline.

tasks.name: Task search and filter
tasks.fullName: Task search and status filter on the task board
tasks.description: Add a text search field to filter tasks by name, plus status filter tabs (All / Pending / In Progress / Blocked) so the board stays manageable as it grows.

tasks.name: Task timeline and history
tasks.fullName: Task timeline with timestamps for creation, start, and completion
tasks.description: Add createdAt, startedAt, completedAt timestamps to tasks. Show a mini-timeline in the detail panel so the manager can see velocity and how long tasks take.

tasks.name: Blocked reason field
tasks.fullName: Add a blocked reason text field for blocked tasks
tasks.description: Tasks can be marked blocked but there's no way to say why. Add a 'blocked reason' text field that appears when status is blocked, visible in the card and detail panel.

tasks.name: Feature-task linking
tasks.fullName: Link tasks to features as epics
tasks.description: Features exist but aren't connected to tasks. Let the manager group tasks under a feature (epic) to get a higher-level view of progress per feature.

tasks.name: State backup and undo
tasks.fullName: Auto-snapshot state.json before destructive operations
tasks.description: No way to recover from accidental task deletes or bad edits. Auto-save a snapshot of state.json before destructive operations (delete, bulk changes) and provide a simple undo/restore mechanism.

tasks.name: Responsive layout
tasks.fullName: Responsive layout for narrow screens and mobile
tasks.description: The 2x2 grid layout doesn't work on narrow screens. Add a collapsible sidebar or tab-based layout for smaller viewports so Dev Manager is usable on tablets and smaller displays.

tasks.name: Extract shared constants
tasks.fullName: Extract shared constants: statuses, colors, hashString
tasks.description: Create src/constants/statuses.js, src/constants/colors.js (EPIC_PALETTE, status colors), src/utils/hash.js (hashString). Remove duplicates from TaskBoard, CommandQueue, TaskDetail.

tasks.name: CSS token system
tasks.fullName: CSS token system: variables.css with design tokens
tasks.description: Expand styles.css into variables.css. Extract all hardcoded hex (#9b8bb4, #6a8dbe, rgba...) into CSS variables. --dm-accent, --dm-amber, --dm-purple, --dm-success, etc. Replace inline color refs.

tasks.name: Extract App.jsx handlers
tasks.fullName: Extract App.jsx handlers into useTaskActions + useQueueActions hooks
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useTaskActions.js (add/update/delete/rename) and src/hooks/useQueueActions.js (queue/launch/clear). App.jsx from ~422 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Split TaskDetail
tasks.fullName: Split TaskDetail into Timeline, Attachments, Dependencies, EpicField
tasks.description: Extract src/components/detail/Timeline.jsx, Attachments.jsx, Dependencies.jsx, EpicField.jsx. TaskDetail from 608 to ~250 lines.

tasks.name: Split TaskBoard
tasks.fullName: Split TaskBoard into TaskCard, EpicGroup, DoneSection, StatusFilter
tasks.description: Extract src/components/board/TaskCard.jsx, EpicGroup.jsx, DoneSection.jsx, StatusFilter.jsx. TaskBoard from 505 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Split CommandQueue
tasks.fullName: Split CommandQueue into QueueItem, PhaseView subcomponents
tasks.description: Extract src/components/queue/QueueItem.jsx, PhaseView.jsx. CommandQueue from 413 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Add TypeScript
tasks.fullName: Add TypeScript: types, tsconfig, rename all files
tasks.description: Create src/types/index.ts (Task, QueueItem, Epic, Activity, ProgressEntry, StateData). Add tsconfig.json strict. Rename .jsx/.js to .tsx/.ts. Type all props and returns.

tasks.name: Inline styles to CSS
tasks.fullName: Migrate inline styles to CSS classes in components.css
tasks.description: Move repeated visual styles to .task-card, .queue-item, .badge-*, .epic-label, .timeline-dot classes. Keep layout inline, move colors/fonts/shadows to CSS. No hardcoded colors in JSX.

tasks.name: Error boundary + loading
tasks.fullName: Add error boundary, loading skeleton, graceful state.json handling
tasks.description: Error boundary wrapper. Loading skeleton for project connect. Handle corrupted/missing state.json gracefully.

tasks.name: Bridge server + headless launch
tasks.fullName: Replace File System Access API with Node.js bridge server and add headless AI execution
tasks.description: Phase 1+2 of product vision. Bridge server on localhost:4545 with REST API + WebSocket. Headless process spawning for Claude/Codex/Cursor. Cross-platform, any browser. Multi-project switching.

tasks.name: Output panel UI
tasks.fullName: Show live AI output in the board — render streamed process output
tasks.description: The bridge server already captures stdout/stderr from AI processes and streams it via WebSocket. Build a UI panel that shows this output live — so the manager can see what the AI is doing without opening a terminal. Expandable per-task output viewer in the queue or detail panel.

tasks.name: Project templates
tasks.fullName: Starter kits for game, web, and mobile projects with pre-configured skills and agents
tasks.description: Bundles per project type: game (game-designer, gameplay-programmer, qa-tester), web (senior-frontend, backend, databases, ui-ux), mobile (mobile-dev, ui-ux, backend). Each includes .claude/skills/, .claude/agents/, default epic-to-skill mappings, and optional scaffold command. Template picker on first project setup.

tasks.name: Engine selector UI
tasks.fullName: Let users pick their preferred AI engine per project — Claude, Codex, or Cursor
tasks.description: The bridge server already supports claude, codex, and cursor engine adapters. Add a UI setting (per project) to choose the default engine. Show engine icon on launch buttons. Allow per-task engine override in the detail panel.

tasks.name: npx devmanager
tasks.fullName: Publish to npm so users can run 'npx devmanager' to install and start
tasks.description: Package the bridge server + built UI for npm publish. Scope the package name (@devmanager/cli or devmanager). Add postinstall or first-run setup. One command: npx devmanager ./my-project — installs, builds, starts server, opens browser. Update README with quick start guide.

tasks.name: Static hosting support
tasks.fullName: Deploy UI to Vercel/Netlify with bridge server connection
tasks.description: Make the web UI deployable as a static site (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages). The UI connects to a local bridge server via configurable URL. User runs bridge server locally, opens hosted UI, enters bridge URL. No need to clone the repo or run npm install for the UI part.

tasks.name: Security: Fix path traversal in server routes
tasks.fullName: Fix path traversal vulnerabilities in knowledge and attachment API routes
tasks.description: Knowledge routes and attachment routes use params directly in file paths without boundary validation. Add startsWith() checks to ensure resolved paths stay within project directory.

tasks.name: Security: Fix command injection in terminal launch
tasks.fullName: Fix command injection in Windows and macOS terminal launch commands
tasks.description: Terminal launch uses string interpolation for shell commands. Use spawn with array args instead of string interpolation to prevent injection. Requires planning.

tasks.name: Testing: Fix broken test interfaces
tasks.fullName: Fix component test prop mismatches and exclude worktree duplicates
tasks.description: ProjectPicker tests reference removed props causing 40+ failures. CommandQueue tests use removed props causing 12+ failures. Add .devmanager/worktrees/ to vitest exclude config to remove ~60 false failures. Quick fix.

tasks.name: Error Handling: Add catch handlers to write operations
tasks.fullName: Add .catch() handlers to writeState and deleteProgressFile calls
tasks.description: Multiple writeState calls in useProject.ts use .then() without .catch(), risking silent data loss. deleteProgressFile calls are fire-and-forget. Attachment save failure creates broken references. Quick fix.

tasks.name: Type Safety: Type WebSocket messages and remove unsafe casts
tasks.fullName: Create discriminated union for WebSocket messages and remove as unknown as casts
tasks.description: WebSocket onMessage accepts untyped msg: any in api.ts. validateState uses as unknown as StateData cast bypassing checks. useQueueActions uses undefined as any. Create proper types and validation.

tasks.name: Domain Logic: Add validation to progress merge and cycles
tasks.fullName: Add validation to progress merge, cycle detection, and activity truncation
tasks.description: mergeProgressIntoState silently ignores non-existent task IDs. Circular dependency handling is silent. Activity log silently truncated to 20 items. Add warnings and validation metadata.

tasks.name: Accessibility: Fix contrast and add missing ARIA labels
tasks.fullName: Fix WCAG AA contrast failure and add missing ARIA attributes
tasks.description: text-light color fails WCAG AA contrast. CardForm inputs lack label associations. Detail panel backdrop has no Escape key handling. Knowledge file list items lack aria-labels. Quick fix.

tasks.name: Split api.js into route modules
tasks.fullName: Split server/api.js into separate route files
tasks.description: server/api.js is 969 lines with 20+ routes in a single flat file. Split into routes/state.js, routes/skills.js, routes/quality.js, etc. Each module exports a router that api.js mounts.

tasks.name: Extract server middleware layer
tasks.fullName: Extract error handling and middleware from server/api.js
tasks.description: api.js has no middleware or error abstraction. Extract shared error handling, request validation, and response formatting into middleware so route handlers stay focused on business logic.

tasks.name: Extract folder dialog helpers
tasks.fullName: Extract inline PowerShell/osascript folder dialogs to utility
tasks.description: server/api.js has inline PowerShell and osascript commands for native folder dialogs. Extract these platform-specific scripts into a dedicated utility module (e.g. server/dialogs.js) with a clean async interface.

tasks.name: Extract useConnection hook
tasks.fullName: Extract WebSocket connection logic from useProject.ts
tasks.description: useProject.ts (415 lines) is a god hook. Extract WebSocket setup, reconnection, and connection state management into a dedicated useConnection hook.
tasks.summary: The main project hook (useProject) has been slimmed down by extracting all WebSocket connection logic into a dedicated useConnection hook. This makes the codebase more maintainable and sets the stage for further hook decomposition without any user-facing behavior changes.

tasks.name: Extract useSync hook
tasks.fullName: Extract file I/O and state sync from useProject.ts
tasks.description: Extract file I/O, state merging, conflict handling, and sync polling logic from useProject.ts into a dedicated useSync hook that useProject composes.

tasks.name: Extract useTemplate hook
tasks.fullName: Extract template loading logic from useProject.ts
tasks.description: Extract template/skill loading and project scaffolding logic from useProject.ts into a dedicated useTemplate hook.

tasks.name: Add ActionContext for App.tsx
tasks.fullName: Create ActionContext to eliminate prop drilling in App.tsx
tasks.description: App.tsx destructures 36+ props and passes 42+ event handlers down. Create an ActionContext (or similar) so child components can consume actions directly instead of receiving them through layers of props.

tasks.name: Extract App.tsx layout concerns
tasks.fullName: Extract tab routing, modal state, and scratchpad from App.tsx
tasks.description: App.tsx (342 lines) handles tab routing, modal state, floating scratchpad, and undo/redo all in one component. Extract these into focused hooks or sub-components (e.g. useTabRouting, useUndoRedo, ModalManager).

tasks.name: Extract task filtering utils
tasks.fullName: Extract shared filtering/grouping logic from TaskBoard
tasks.description: Epic color calculation, status filtering, and grouping logic in TaskBoard.tsx repeats across TaskBoard, StatusFilter, and CommandQueue. Extract into a shared utility (e.g. taskFilters.ts) used by all three.
tasks.summary: Task board, queue, and detail panels now share a single source of truth for filtering, grouping, and epic color logic — eliminating duplicated calculations that could drift out of sync. No visible UI changes, but the codebase is cleaner and more maintainable for future feature work.

tasks.name: Reduce TaskBoard memoization
tasks.fullName: Simplify TaskBoard.tsx memoization strategy
tasks.description: TaskBoard.tsx has 37 useMemo calls. After extracting shared filtering utils, audit remaining memos — remove unnecessary ones, consolidate related ones, and keep only those with measurable perf impact.

tasks.name: Extract shared addActivity hook
tasks.fullName: Deduplicate activity logging across action hooks
tasks.description: useTaskActions.ts and useQueueActions.ts both have identical addActivity helper functions. Extract to a shared useActivity hook or utility that both consume.
tasks.summary: Activity logging is now powered by a single shared utility instead of duplicated code in two places. No visible changes for users — this is a behind-the-scenes cleanup that makes future activity-related features easier and safer to build.

tasks.name: Convert inline styles to CSS classes
tasks.fullName: Replace common inline style patterns with CSS utility classes
tasks.description: 448 instances of style={{. Audit and convert common layout patterns (flex, padding, positioning, gaps) to CSS classes in styles.css. Only dynamic values (state-dependent colors, opacity, transforms) should remain inline.

tasks.name: Add server API tests
tasks.fullName: Add test coverage for server/api.js routes
tasks.description: server/api.js has zero test coverage while the frontend has 13 test files. Add integration tests for the backend routes covering state CRUD, skill operations, quality endpoints, and error cases.

tasks.name: Add knowledge init endpoint
tasks.fullName: POST /api/knowledge/init — create knowledge directories
tasks.description: Add POST /api/knowledge/init route to api.js that creates .devmanager/knowledge/ and .devmanager/decisions/ directories if they don't already exist.

tasks.name: Add list knowledge endpoint
tasks.fullName: GET /api/knowledge — list all knowledge and decision files
tasks.description: Add GET /api/knowledge route that lists all .md files from both .devmanager/knowledge/ and .devmanager/decisions/ dirs. Return title (first # line), filename, lastModified, and sections (h2 headings) for each file. Support ?q= query parameter for search filtering.

tasks.name: Add read knowledge endpoint
tasks.fullName: GET /api/knowledge/:type/:file — read a single knowledge file
tasks.description: Add GET /api/knowledge/:type/:file route where type is 'knowledge' or 'decisions'. Read and return the full markdown content of the requested file.

tasks.name: Add save knowledge endpoint
tasks.fullName: PUT /api/knowledge/:type/:file — save knowledge file content
tasks.description: Add PUT /api/knowledge/:type/:file route that writes the request body as the new content of the specified markdown file in the appropriate directory.

tasks.name: Add delete knowledge endpoint
tasks.fullName: DELETE /api/knowledge/:type/:file — delete a knowledge file
tasks.description: Add DELETE /api/knowledge/:type/:file route that removes the specified markdown file from .devmanager/knowledge/ or .devmanager/decisions/.

tasks.name: Watch knowledge directories
tasks.fullName: Watch knowledge and decisions dirs for file changes
tasks.description: Add .devmanager/knowledge/ and .devmanager/decisions/ directories to watcher.js. Broadcast a 'knowledge-changed' WebSocket event on any file change. No JSON parsing needed — these are plain markdown files, so a simple notification is sufficient.

tasks.name: Add useKnowledge hook
tasks.fullName: useKnowledge hook — fetch list, refetch on WS, expose CRUD
tasks.description: Create a useKnowledge hook that fetches the knowledge file list via the API, automatically refetches when a 'knowledge-changed' WebSocket event is received, and exposes getFile, saveFile, and deleteFile methods for the UI to consume.

tasks.name: Add KnowledgePanel shell
tasks.fullName: KnowledgePanel component with Knowledge/Decisions sub-tabs
tasks.description: Create the KnowledgePanel component with sub-tab navigation to switch between Knowledge and Decisions views. Use the same warm neutral palette and inline style patterns as existing panels.

tasks.name: Add knowledge file list with search
tasks.fullName: File list view with search filter in KnowledgePanel
tasks.description: Within KnowledgePanel, render the list of files for the active sub-tab (knowledge or decisions). Include a search input that filters files using the ?q= API parameter. Show title and last-modified for each entry.

tasks.name: Add markdown detail view
tasks.fullName: Markdown rendering detail view for knowledge files
tasks.description: When a file is selected from the list, fetch its content and render it as formatted markdown in a detail pane. Follow the same layout patterns as TaskDetail (list on left, detail on right).

tasks.name: Add inline knowledge editor
tasks.fullName: Inline editor for editing knowledge files in place
tasks.description: Add an edit mode to the detail view that replaces the rendered markdown with a text editor. Save button calls the PUT endpoint via useKnowledge. Cancel discards changes.

tasks.name: Add new knowledge entry form
tasks.fullName: Form for creating new knowledge or decision entries
tasks.description: Add a 'New entry' form to KnowledgePanel that lets the manager create a new .md file in the selected sub-tab's directory. Collect a title, generate a filename slug, and save via the API.

tasks.name: Add delete with confirmation
tasks.fullName: Delete knowledge file with confirmation dialog
tasks.description: Add a delete button to the detail view that shows a confirmation dialog before calling the DELETE endpoint. Remove the file from the list on success.

tasks.name: Add decision status badge
tasks.fullName: Parse and display status badge on decision files
tasks.description: For files in the decisions sub-tab, parse the **Status:** line from frontmatter (e.g. 'active', 'revisited', 'superseded') and render a colored status badge on both the list item and the detail view.

tasks.name: Add seed-knowledge button
tasks.fullName: Seed from project button that launches /seed-knowledge
tasks.description: Add a 'Seed from project' button to the KnowledgePanel that launches the /seed-knowledge command to auto-generate initial knowledge entries from the codebase and git history.

tasks.name: Add Knowledge tab to App.tsx
tasks.fullName: Add Knowledge as 3rd tab in the main App tab bar
tasks.description: Add a 'Knowledge' tab alongside Board and Quality in App.tsx's tab bar. When selected, render the KnowledgePanel component.

queue.taskName: Convert inline styles to CSS classes
